questionHtml:
A beam of electrons moves between the poles of a magnet.

                                                     

What is the direction in which the electrons will be deflected?

A.     Downwards

B.     Towards the N pole of the magnet

C.     Towards the S pole of the magnet

D.     Upwards

meta.title: A beam of electrons moves between the poles of a magnet. What is the direction in which the electrons will be deflected? A. Downwards B. Towards the N pole of the magnet C. Towards
